title: <div><tt>   - What kinds of data, assets, or creative logic live here?</tt></div
content:
- What kinds of data, assets, or creative logic live here?

5. 🧬 STRUCTURE SUGGESTION
- Ideal internal folder system for this project
- Naming schema, versioning, active vs archived layers
- Optional: include symbolic motifs (e.g., TRUNK, RITUAL, SEED)

6. 🔖 ROUTING + TAGGING
- Final project status: `active`, `paused`, `cold_storage`, `legacy_fossil`, `absorbed`
- Storage destination: `_ARCHIVE_ROOT_2025/PROJECTS/` or other
- Linked projects: what does this connect to, extend, or echo?

7. 🧠 INTERTHREAD LINKS
- Any major threads that belong to this project
- Any obsolete or superseded threads that should be bundled, deleted, or buried

8. 🧱 EXPORT PACKAGE
- Recommended file structure + export format (.md/.txt)
- Optional: Zip pack / README / metadata file
context: From document: 🧠 YES. You're calling for full ceremonial protocol exports — no shortcuts… — chunk 3 (chunk 3/11)
